richland-parish-la-2025-08-01.notes: Meta Hyperion. 2,230 MW from Entergy gas capacity filing (2.23 GW). 2,250 acres initial site (Meta has since purchased additional 1,400 acres for expansion). 5M gallons/day water usage. 4M sq ft facility. Investment already correctly at $27B in DB.

the-dalles-or-2026-01-15.notes: Google The Dalles. $1.8B total investment in campus. 434M gallons/year (2024) = ~1.19M gal/day. Google has multiple campuses in The Dalles; total acreage spans original campus + 74-acre expansion + former Martin-Marietta smelter site. MW not publicly disclosed by Google.

blanchard-north-caddo-parish-la-2026-03-.notes: Amazon NW Louisiana. 10M sq ft total across 3 interconnected campuses in Caddo/Bossier parishes. building_sq_ft should be updated from 7M to 10M based on latest reporting.

pine-island-mn-2025-10-16.notes: Google Project Skyway. 152K gal/day per adopted AUAR. 250K sq ft data center + 35K sq ft office on ~88 acres of the 482-acre park. 100 permanent jobs. NOTE: 1,900 MW figure in press is total new clean energy Xcel will add to the grid (wind/solar/storage), NOT the data center's actual power draw.

vicksburg-ms-2025-11-20.notes: Amazon Vicksburg. At least 200 full-time jobs confirmed. $3B investment already in DB. Specific MW, acreage, and water figures not yet publicly disclosed.

west-memphis-ar-2025-10-01.notes: Google Project Pyramid. 500-800 MW at full buildout (800 MW upper estimate). Total investment now $10B (up from initial $4B). 300 permanent + 5,000 construction jobs. 600 MW solar + 350 MW battery storage planned. Acreage already 1,178 in DB. investment_million_usd should be updated from 4000 to 10000.

louisa-county-va-2025-06-01.notes: Amazon Louisa County (withdrawn third campus proposal). 7 substations x 300 MW = 2,100 MW potential. $28.8B if fully built out. 7.2M sq ft proposed. Acreage 1,370 already in DB.

stafford-county-va-2025-10-22.notes: Vantage Data Centers VA4 campus. 192 MW IT capacity. $2B investment. 82 acres, 929K sq ft, three 2-story buildings. Closed-loop chilled water cooling.

west-louisville-ky-2026-03-05.notes: PowerHouse Data Centers + Poe Companies. Up to 400 MW (initial 335 MW secured from LG&E). 153 acres on Camp Ground Road near Shively. ~$2B estimated investment.

waterford-ct-2024-01-09.notes: NE Edge at Millstone. $1.6B investment. 55 acres of Millstone's 526-acre site. 1.5M sq ft across two 2-story buildings. 300 MW already in DB.

osceola-county-fl-2024-10-01.notes: US Development Yeehaw Junction. 9 three-story buildings at 675K sq ft each = 7M+ sq ft total. 434 acres already in DB.

newton-county-covington-ga-2026-01-20.notes: Meta Stanton Springs. $750M initial investment (broke ground 2018). ~500K gal/day water usage (10% of local supply).

hancock-county-in-2025-06-01.notes: Surge Development (likely Google). Developer stated 24 MW and 700 gal/day. Figures seem low for 775-acre campus; may represent initial phase only. Project withdrawn.

baldwin-county-stockton-al-2025-12-02.notes: Silicon Ranch solar for Meta. 260 MW combined (Stockton I: 80 MW + Stockton II: 180 MW). $300M and 4,500 acres already in DB.

village-of-greenleaf-wi-2026-01-13.notes: Cloverleaf Infrastructure. ~500 acres at $120K/acre. Up to 200 jobs. Project cancelled after community opposition.

logan-county-wv-2025-09-02.notes: TransGas Adams Fork Energy. 117 engines x 21 MW = 2,457 MW per facility at Holden. Second identical facility at Wharncliffe (~4,914 MW total for both).

conway-ar-2025-04-01.notes: Forgelight Ventures (confirmed Google front company). 300K sq ft facility. ~50 permanent jobs. $1B investment already in DB.
